programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The police launch a search when Nick, George and Greengrass are locked in the cellar of the Aidensfield Arms overnight by robbers, who make off with the contents of the till. Its not until morning that the trio are discovered by a man delivering beer to the pub. Elsewhere, Greengrass told Nick that Dave Chapman is trading in stolen farm machinery.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Reg Manston has built up his pedigree herd through years of back-breaking work and now has to face losing it all. The outbreak is reported to Nick and he goes to investigate. At first Manston denies that there is anything wrong, and then he relents and lets a vet examine the animal.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: After Martin learns Louises news, she is determined that he wont be involved. Elsewhere, Louise learns something about the past that Edith and Martin shared, and the new headmaster at the school is acting oddly.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: PC Penhale is delighted when his beloved older brother Sam comes to visit. When Sam offers to re-paint the surgery, Martin observes him and concludes that he may have a rare genetic disease, but a blood test discloses something unexpected which could alter the brothers bond forever. Meanwhile, Al acts on some relationship advice from Bert but things go from bad to worse with Pauline.

programme.desc: When a mans naked body is found at the centre of a crop circle and more corpses begin turning up with peculiar injuries, DCI Barnaby has to uncover who is responsible - or are extraterrestrial powers really at work in Midsomer?

programme.desc: Everyone is excited when Mummy Rabbit arrives with a big tummy and they learn that she is carrying a baby bunny inside - but it turns out they are in for an even bigger surprise.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A curious, naive, yet friendly little pig navigates through her life with her friends and family by her side. Guided by her loving mother and brash father, Peppa is stuck almost every day. Her little siblings, however, look up to Peppa lovingly.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa receives an invite to Candy Cats birthday party, but a double-decker party bus arrives; the bus goes to the playground and even the beach, hosting the best party ever.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: While visiting Suzy and Emilys house, Peppa is surprised that there are extra rules which she does not have in her own house. On the drive home, Peppa explains to Mummy Pig that different houses have different rules.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Animated series about a lovable little pig.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and Georges toy basket is full and their beds are covered in toys, so Mummy Pig decides it is time to order a new toy cupboard. The cupboard arrives in the post but it needs to be assembled - and Mummy and Daddy Pig are not very good at DIY. Luckily help is at hand, as Mr Zebra the Postman loves assembling flat pack furniture.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pigs book is finished, and its time to show it off to Peppa and her playgroup friends. Unfortunately, Peppa and George lose some of the book when they are playing, and Mummy Pig has to think quickly to fix it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When George loses the metal wind-up key for his toy robot in the long grass, Grandpa Pig cannot find his metal detector to help George track it down.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Playgroup play many games using a parachute.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A curious, naive, yet friendly little pig navigates through her life with her friends and family by her side. Guided by her loving mother and brash father, Peppa is stuck almost every day. Her little siblings, however, look up to Peppa lovingly.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family renovate their home.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: In the game group, Peppa and his friends make their own instruments from old wrappers.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its Wendy Wolfs birthday and she has invited Peppa and all her friends to her party! There are bubbles and balloons to play with - and Wendy even teaches them how to howl like a wolf!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A curious, naive, yet friendly little pig navigates through her life with her friends and family by her side. Guided by her loving mother and brash father, Peppa is stuck almost every day. Her little siblings, however, look up to Peppa lovingly.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family hire a canoe from Miss Rabbit. They imagine they are in a jungle and then unexpectedly bump into Mrs Crocodile. Later on, Mr Lion invites them to have a picnic.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Lotte Llama joins the playgroup, and teaches the others how to speak German.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George enjoys seeing his reflection in the mirror so much that he and Peppa try to find other shiny things to see themselves in.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its night time at Grandpa and Granny Pigs house, and Peppa and George have stayed up late to help hunt for slugs and snails, but what other night animals will they find?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are busy building a desert island in a sandpit. They are all very proud of it, with its forest, lake, houses and shops. Its going splendidly, until George and Richards dinosaurs turn up.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is left behind when everyone takes Grampy Rabbits little boat to the riverside picnic spot. Will someone remember him and save him some cake?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: After smelling Granny Pigs perfume de lavender, Peppa experiments with the flowers in the garden to create her own special smell.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When a fishing trip goes wrong, leaving Grandpa Pig and Grampy Rabbit stranded on a desert island, Captain Daddy Dog is the only one able to save them. It makes him realise that he misses the sea after all.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Mr Foxs Shop to buy Granny and Grandpa an anniversary present, but what will they choose from the shop that sells everything?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its a beautiful day but Peppa, George and Grandpa Pig are sitting inside watching the motor racing on the television! Granny Pig shoos them all outside to enjoy the sunshine. Inspired by the racing, Grandpa Pig builds George his own racing car.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Goldie the Goldfish is feeling a little lonely, so Peppa takes her to the aquarium. With all the different fish there, surely Peppa can find a new friend for Goldie?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa loves the school fete. Her favourite things are face painting, the balloons and the bouncy castle.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit is to be given the Queens Award for Industry for all the hard work she does, and Peppa and her friends are to accompany her to the palace to meet the Queen.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig reads Peppa and George a bedtime story to help them fall asleep. When George wakes up again, Peppa has to make up a bedtime story to get him back to sleep.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are playing at the pond with their toy boats, but when Peppa and Georges friends arrive, everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppas family is staying at Cousin Chloes house. Its been a long day and everyone is tired and sleepy, but baby Alexander keeps everyone awake with his crying.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Eek! Theres a spider in the house. Mummy Pig tells Daddy Pig to get rid of it. Mr Skinny-Legs is set free in the garden, where he can spin all the webs he likes.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Playgroup is having a pet competition and everyone has brought their pets. Dr Hamster is the judge, but it is so hard to choose the best pet.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: Grandpa Pigs Train to the Rescue
programme.desc: Oh dear! Miss Rabbits train has broken down and all her passengers need to get to work. So Grandpa Pig lends Miss Rabbit his little train, Gertrude.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George pays a visit to Mr Foxs Shop after his favourite toy, Mr Dinosaur, breaks. With all the additional features, surely Dino Roar is a good replacement?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have been on a trip to a mountain beauty spot. When Daddy Pig loses the car keys down a drain, Mr Bull offers to find them with his digger.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: To celebrate Freddy Foxs birthday, the children go on a trip to a Dinosaur Park. With Grampy Rabbit as their leader, they follow dinosaur footprints to find Freddys birthday treat.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Dog and Danny are very excited! Captain Daddy Dog is home from the sea, and hes bearing gifts! What can they be?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George meet Kylie Kangaroo and her brother Joey. Peppa shows Kylie how to jump up and down in muddy puddles, but who can jump the highest?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Peppa goes for a sleepover at Zoe Zebras house with Suzy Sheep, Rebecca Rabbit, Candy Cat and Emily Elephant, the girls are too excited to go to sleep.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig and Peppa are at Granny Pigs house. They find Mummys old patchwork quilt that Granny made for her as a baby. Peppa decides shed like to make one for the baby!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is so excited to meet her new baby brother or sister, but they are taking forever to arrive until suddenly Mummy Pig announces the baby is coming, now!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On a beautiful sunny day, Grandpa takes Peppa and George to spend the day sailing. After an accident, the boat ends up sinking, and now they need rescuing with a hovercraft.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When the Police visit the school, officers Panda and Squirrel teach Peppa and her friends all about bicycle safety.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends play some very active games in the garden and together they learn to hop, skip and jump.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle teaches the children how to play the recorder. They practise a lot at home, then put on a performance for all the parents to enjoy.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, George and Daddy Pig visit the charity shop to sell things they dont need, and things they may need.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The nurse is popping around, and she decides that todays visit should be all about how to hold a baby. The nurse shows Peppa a special way for a small person to safely hold a baby.

programme.desc: Animated series about a lovable little pig.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Carnival has come to town and its a chance to see all sorts of exciting things! There is Mr. Bulls Jazz Band, Miss Rabbit as the Carnival Queen and even a very special appearance from Mr. Potato.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Rebecca and Richard Rabbit are playing a marble run game at Peppas house. But when Daddy Pig joins in and improvises tunnels and bridges, the marble rolls out of the bedroom, causing chaos and nearly knocking Goldie out of her bowl.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are watching TV... until it breaks! While Grampy Rabbit fixes it, the family get a new TV which can do everything... but it doesnt beat their old TV.

programme.desc: A curious, naive, yet friendly little pig navigates through her life with her friends and family by her side. Guided by her loving mother and brash father, Peppa is stuck almost every day. Her little siblings, however, look up to Peppa lovingly.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to animate their drawings at playgroup.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit has hurt her ankle, so her sister and her friends offer to fill in for her at the ice cream stand, the supermarket - and everywhere else she works.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit gives Mummy Pig, Peppa and George a ride in her rescue helicopter. Daddy Pig is very sad to escape all the fun - but Miss Rabbit makes sure that doesnt happen.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her playgroup friends go with Madame Gazelle to visit Pedro Pony, who is poorly in hospital.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster visits the school and brings some animals with her. Binky the Tortoise is very popular - but ends up needing to be rescued by Miss Rabbit.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are at the school fete where the top prize in the raffle is a trip in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Mummy Pig helps out at Miss Rabbits fire station, she is called upon to douse the flames at Daddy Pigs out-of-control barbecue.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has a book from the library that he has kept for too long. The family go to the library to return it and find more books to read.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa loves the school fete. Her favourite things are face painting, the balloons and the bouncy castle.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its Daddy Pigs birthday, but he has to go to work, so while hes away, Mummy Pig, Peppa and George prepare a special birthday surprise.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig let Peppa and George put their coats on over their pyjamas and go outside to look at the stars. With the help of a telescope, Daddy Pig teaches Peppa and George how to find the North Star.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in the garden with their bouncy ball when Suzy Sheep turns up with two tennis rackets. She uses the bouncy ball to play a game of tennis with Peppa, making George feel left out. Will the job of ball boy cheer him up?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When a power cut plunges their house into darkness, Peppa and George have fun looking for a torch and thinking of games to play in the dark.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family borrow Grandpa Pigs boat and head out for a day on the river. All is going well until the boat gets stuck in some long reeds - Daddy Pig to the rescue.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go on a camping trip with their teacher, Madame Gazelle. After pitching their tents and collecting sticks, they all sing a song around the campfire.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy Sheep are best friends, but one day they have a quarrel over a game of cards, and decide they are not best friends anymore.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are helping Granny and Grandpa Pig tidy their attic, but they have trouble deciding what to throw out, because Granny and Grandpa want to keep everything.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family follow a nature trail in the countryside, discovering footprints left by little birds and ants.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go to Rebecca Rabbits house where, instead of stairs and corridors, there are tunnels.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family visit a museum, and Peppa likes the Kings and Queens room, whereas Georges favourite is the dinosaur room.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes Peppa and her school friends on a school bus trip to the mountains. From the top of the mountains, there is a fantastic view, and Peppa and her friends have fun hearing echoes.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Peppa and George go to the dentist for a check-up, Dr Elephant says their teeth are nice and white, but Georges toy dinosaur is in need of a tooth-clean.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The grass has grown so long that Peppa and Georges ball gets lost in it. It falls to Grandpa to save the day with Betsy, his motorised lawnmower.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go ice skating, but they have never been before, and Peppa keeps falling over.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa decides that only girls can play in her treehouse, so Grandpa Pig builds the boys their own den.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa loves cycling downhill, but is not so keen on peddling uphill, so she insists everyone have a downhill race.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are visiting their big cousin Chloe, and will get to meet Chloes new baby brother Alexander for the first time.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig has built a fantastic little train called Gertrude, and when they take a ride, they give all their friends a ride.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, George and Daddy are in the garden painting a picture of a cherry tree when the ducks turn up and run through the paint, and all over their masterpiece.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Suzy Sheep has come to play with Peppa, and has made up a pretend friend called `Leo Lion. Peppa cant see Leo, but Suzy announces that Leo likes roaring and playing dressing up.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George love jumping in muddy puddles, even when its raining, but when George takes off his rain hat he catches a cold. After plenty of rest and some warm milk and honey, George begins to feel much better.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig take Peppa, George and all their friends on a boat trip to Pirate Island. On the island, Grandpa shows everyone how to use his metal detector to find treasure and they all build a big sandcastle.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Daddy Pigs office and meet his colleagues. Mr Rabbit works with numbers, while Mrs Cat seems to spend her time drawing shapes on a computer.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George join Granny Pig and her friends to play at being Vikings.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle and the playgroup are sharing their favourite nursery thymes. From singing Little Bo Peep to marching along with The Grand Old Duke of York, everyone enjoys listening to each others choice.

programme.desc: Peppa and her family team up with Danny Dog to swing across the monkey trees.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The children want to make their own takeaway. Together they cook and deliver the pretend takeaways to the parents. They get great reviews, but nothing beats a real lunch!

programme.desc: Peppa and George play with walkie-talkies at Granny and Grandpa Pigs house. Grandpa Pig teaches Peppa and George how to use codenames to talk using the gadgets.

programme.desc: The Detective introduces his new friend, the superhero Super Potato who teaches children the importance of eating fruits and vegetables every day, and later helps the Detective out of a complicated situation.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: The Devil Wears Rodentia; Career Day

programme.desc: In the late fall of 1944 American soldiers suffer terrible losses when they are ordered into the forbidding and fiercely defended terrain of the Hurtgen Forest and the Vosges Mountains. programme.title: Willie Nelson: Live at iTunes Festival

programme.title: Yes - Songs From Tsongas 35th Anniversary
programme.desc: Songs From Tsongas is a live performance from Yes 35th Anniversary Tour in 2004, the last tour by the band to feature the classic line-up of Jon Anderson, Steve Howe, Chris Squire, Rick Wakeman and Alan White.

programme.title: James Morrison - T In The Park
programme.desc: T in the Park festival is a major Scottish music festival that has been held almost annually since 1994 (the event did not take place in 2017). It is named after its main sponsor, the brewing company Tennents.

programme.title: Iggy Pop - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Celine Dion - Taking Chances World Tour
programme.desc: Part of the world tour of Celine Dion, which was seen by more than 3 million people and covered 5 continents, 25 countries and 92 cities - the first tour in nine years that was an absolute success.

programme.title: Adele - iTunes Festival: Live in London
programme.desc: Fans at the iTunes Festival: London 2011 were blown away with the performance of English singer-songwriter Adele. This concert was recorded live on stage at The Roundhouse in London, United Kingdom, where Adele gave one of the best shows.

programme.title: Britney Spears - Live from London
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Britney Spears performs her hits including Baby One More Time, Oops! I Did It Again, Toxic and many more.

programme.title: Lady Gaga -- Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Lady Gagas performance at the iTunes Festival in London on Sept. 1, 2013 marks her first full concert since the Born This Way Ball.

programme.title: Green Day: Live at Fox Theater
programme.desc: Green Day performs from "21st Century Breakdown", at the Fox Theater in the bands hometown, Oakland, California.

programme.title: Muse: Live at Festival Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: Rock Am Ring in Nurburgring and Rock Im Park in Nuremberg are music festivals that take place annually at the Nurburgring Race Track in Western Germany, featuring Muse.

programme.title: Tom Petty and The Heartbreakers - Live at Soundstage
programme.desc: Filmed live from the Vic Theatre.

programme.title: Robert Plant - Live in London 2014
programme.desc: ITunes Festival is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London.

programme.title: The Offspring: Rock AM
programme.desc: The Offspring is an American rock band from California; originally formed under the name Manic Subsidal, the bands lineup consists of lead vocalist and rhythm guitarist Dexter Holland, bassist Todd Morse and lead guitarist Kevin Wasserman.

programme.title: Qello Concerts Best
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts.

programme.title: Qello Concerts Best
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts.

programme.title: Paramore - Live at the Roundhouse
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike attempts to double his money as he tries to turn a down-at-heel Frogeye Sprite into a premiership quality classic car, then test drives it around the Brooklands Motor Museum.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Sam set off down to Rays shop to sell a bike, but while there, they discover that Ray has plenty for the boys to rummage around in. They have a wonderful day, but come away with less than they want.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: The deal-searching duo are near Preston at Grahams place. They discover that Graham is also keen on military gear and Americana. In the end, though, Henry and Sam come away with something a little unusual and decide to put it to the test.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: No fewer than four experts pool their talents to tackle the repair of a battered old ventriloquists dummy who goes by the name of George. George and owner Alan were once a formidable stage double act, but time has taken its toll on Alans cheeky sidekick, leaving him with wonky eyes, a severely chipped face and virtually no hair.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew and Al buy from businesses in the process of change. They find a striking Windsor chair, an anatomical model, and artefacts from a former mill.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: With her new shop opening, Viki fills the van while on the road with Drew. They snap up French advertising art and a dolls-house cabinet.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It is the final leg of our journey with veteran tripper Raj Bisram and relative rookie Paul Martin. After an epic tour of the south and south west, their shopping and saleroom extravaganza concludes at a Palladian mansion in the Cotswolds. The open-topped classic car transports our duo to Shakespeare country, Warwickshire, where dealer Paul and auctioneer Raj hope to acquire anything going for a sonnet. They find out about alpacas and llamas, and discover the historical roots of ballet.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Auctioneer Angus and his team are called out to house clearances, looking through a lifetimes worth of personal possessions, and deciding what to sell at auction, what to recycle and what should be taken to the tip.

programme.title: Shed and Buried

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring four treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. Widower Geoff Clark from Sunderland is hoping audio expert Mark Stuckey can restore a beloved jukebox that holds memories of a very special person. He bought the 1960s jukebox over 40 years ago, around the time he met his late wife, Marie. The two shared a love of music and the jukebox gave them both such joy, even providing the entertainment at their wedding reception.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.sub-title: Jamaican Pump Organ, WW1 Crib, Naval Rigging Set

They are hoping organ-restorer David Burville can revive their late mothers pride and joy, a portable pump organ. The organ accompanied their parents as they journeyed from Jamaica to begin a new life in the UK, along with many other West Indians, during the Windrush era.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: A sniper is brought to justice through ballistic tests. A bloody hand print leads to a suspect in a double homicide, and a semen sample is tied to gunman.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: The naked body of a Swedish man is found, a father and son are accused of killing a woman, and a police officer impostor disposes of her love rival.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: When an eight-year-old girl disappears from her neighbourhood, citizens and police search the region to find her and her abductor.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Masked gunmen robbed an armoured car facility in LA, and made off with $18.9 million. With only one piece of physical evidence, a fragment of a vehicle tail light, the FBI hoped to connect a former employee to the crime.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.sub-title: Nicola Fellows and Karen Hadaway; Operation Seventy
programme.desc: The murders of two nine-year-old girls in Brighton in 1986 shocks the nation. Nicola and Karens families campaigned for 32 years to bring the man responsible to justice. The National Crime Agency reveal the inside story of an investigation to catch a gang of gun smugglers, suspected of bringing lethal military-style weapons into the UK by boat.

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love
programme.desc: In 2015, a hunter comes across a woman in the woods who has been murdered. Detectives unravel a web of dark secrets and lies that lead to a twisted killer.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: A young woman on the brink of starting her dream job disappears and its down to forensic officers to gather the clues that may lead to her whereabouts.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: When nursing student Michelle Le disappears without a trace, police discover CCTV footage of her car driving around a car park. Who is the driver?

programme.title: Nurses Who Kill
programme.desc: When nurse Roger Dean was caught on camera stealing drugs from an Australian care home to feed his addiction, he set the place on fire and tragically killed ten people in the incident.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Monsters can be found lurking behind any innocent smile and on any street corner in America. Never-before-seen-video footage stares straight into the eyes of these killers who hide in plain sight.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: John Eichner, his wife and kids look like a happy family in Genoa, Ohio, but behind closed doors a disturbing pattern of torment and gaslighting plays out for years, and well-crafted lies drown out a victims pleas for help.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: Apache County Sheriffs Office begins a double homicide investigation after the gruesome discovery of an elderly couples remains in Sanders, Ariz.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the case of Joanna Yeates, whose body was found on Christmas morning 2010, and the hunt to catch her killer.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: A student suddenly vanishes after her shift at work. However, CCTV footage shows her last movements, revealing the chilling reason for her disappearance.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In 2018, police search a backyard in Florida for a body after a once-idyllic marriage sours and turns vengeful, filled with lies and affairs.

programme.title: The Friday the 13th Murders
programme.desc: A young woman vanishes after entering a patrol car; for 35 years, shes a Jane Doe; as fear and rumours consume a small town, a chilling clue under hypnosis cracks the case open-and exposes a predator no one saw coming.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Police in Wisconsin are stunned to find an elderly couple brutally killed in their home. When family start to receive death threats, will murder strike again?

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: In 1988, a couple are shot in their home, but husband Dan Montecalvo survives. The investigation uncovers a scheming killer who nearly got away with the perfect murder.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Larissa Macriello, a 44-year-old masseuse, vanishes from her apartment in Miami, and police discover a dangerous edge to her carefree lifestyle.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: In 1994, 55-year-old wealthy businessman Bill is found shot in his kitchen. The police suspect his disabled son, but would he have had the capability to carry out a murder?

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Property developer Jana Koklich disappears, and police believe that her job led her into danger, until a local pastor makes a shocking confession.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: A maid finds a woman dead in Room 305 of an Oregon hotel. Her grieving husband reveals an open relationship, but was an affair to blame?

programme.title: Inside The Arrest

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files of a Texas Ranger
programme.desc: When two children turn up dead in a hot car, police suspect their mother is lying; Ranger Holland joins the investigation to find out what really happened; he confronts the mother in a series of interrogations that ultimately reveal the truth.

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime

programme.title: The Victorian Murder Files

programme.title: Aquaman

programme.title: Blood for Dust
programme.desc: Travelling salesman Cliff is drowning under the weight of providing for his family and finds himself on a dangerous path after a chance encounter with a colleague who has a dark past. Desperate to keep his fragile home life intact, Cliff agrees to partner with Ricky and run cocaine across Montana.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates a gang of LA street racers while investigating a rash of truck robberies.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A widowed farmer, with a brave but brutal military past, decides not to join up when the British arrive in 1776. However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Loose-cannon cops Lowrey and Burnett reduce Miami to rubble as they try to stop Cuban and Russian drug smugglers from flooding Florida with ecstasy.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7
programme.desc: After defeating international terrorist Owen Shaw, Dominic Toretto, Brian OConner and the rest of the crew have separated to return to more normal lives. However, Deckard Shaw, Owens older brother, is thirsty for revenge. A slick government agent offers to help Dom and company take care of Shaw in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker who has developed a powerful surveillance program.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8
programme.desc: The globetrotting crew faces an unexpected challenge when a mysterious woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. Now, they must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop her from unleashing chaos on a grand scale.

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan
programme.desc: Lured from Victorian England to the wilds of the Congo, Tarzan must return to the jungle to save his captive wife from King Leopolds devious envoy.

programme.title: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Mercenary Josh Hartnett is assigned a target on a flight. But when rival assassins board the plane, assassin and target are forced to team up. Gory action thriller. (2025, 98 mins)

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain, the last Gunslinger, must prevent the Man in Black from toppling the Dark Tower, the key that holds the universe together.

programme.title: The Dark Tower

programme.title: Deep Sea
programme.desc: Swept into the sea during a family cruise, a young girl named Shenxiu stumbles upon a mysterious restaurant under the waves. There, she meets the scheming head chef and his ragtag crew of adorable otters and sarcastic walruses.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: Rock Dog 3: Battle the Beat
programme.desc: Hoping to inspire a new generation of rock stars, Bodi joins a musical competition show and becomes an overnight TV personality sensation.

programme.title: Justice League Vs. Bizarro League
programme.desc: Superman, Batman and the rest of the Justice League team up with the Bizarro League to defeat Darkseid.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Dracula, who operates a high-end resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the counts teen-aged daughter.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: Barry B Benson is an everybee with a dream. He escapes the hive and makes contact with a human, the florist Vanessa Bloome. Enraged to discover that humans have been stealing their honey goodness, Barry sets out on a crusade that will change the ecosystem forever. Will it be for the better? A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: This is the story of a ten-year-old boy named Lucas Nickle, who has just moved to a new neighbourhood, has no friends, and is the target for the local bully and his gang. His parents are leaving for a honeymoon in Puerto Vallarta, so they are too busy to attend to his problems. His sister is distracted by her cellular phone, and the grandmother is obsessed with UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: Monster Family
programme.desc: Draculas spell turns a woman and her loved ones into a vampire, a mummy, a werewolf and Frankensteins monster.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Concerned that his half-human grandson isnt showing his vampire side, Dracula and his friends put the boy through a `monster-in-training boot camp just as Dracs old-school father decides to pay a visit.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail gets the chance to escape his slow-paced life and race in the Indianapolis 500 when a freak accident gives him the power of superspeed.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Inventor Flint Lockwood dreams of discovering an idea that will change peoples lives forever, and after several misguided attempts he may just have done it. Flint has invented a machine that can turn water into delicious food, and, when his first demonstration accidentally sends the machine shooting into the clouds, cheeseburgers begin raining down from the sky.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Discovering that his most-famous machine is now creating animal/vegetable hybrids, inventor Flint Lockwood and his friends venture forth to save the world from tacodiles, shrimpanzees and other creatures.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: When the beast-themed Animilitia plague Gotham, Batman swings out to investigate. But with The Penguin and his cyber-animals added to the mix, Batman will need the help of Green Arrow and The Flash to bring them to heel.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Mechs vs. Mutants
programme.desc: Gotham City faces catastrophe when Mr Freeze transforms Killer Croc and Bane into mega-sized mutant monsters. As the gigantic villains go on the rampage, its up to the caped crusader to cut them down to size.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Dumped and depressed, English rose Iris agrees to swap homes with similarly unlucky in love Californian Amanda for a much-needed break. Iris finds herself in a palatial Hollywood mansion while Amanda navigates the lanes of a picture-perfect English village. Soon enough, both lovelorn ladies bump into local lads perfect for a romantic pick-me-up.

programme.title: One More Shot
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, Minnie discovers a bottle of tequila that allows her to travel through time, each shot taking her back to the start of the night, giving her the chance to alter the course of her millennium.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wifes infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his bumbling father, Detective Frank Drebin Jr. must solve a murder case to prevent Police Squad from shutting down.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa
programme.desc: Irving Zisman takes his young and impressionable grandson on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa .5
programme.desc: Irving Zisman takes his young and impressionable grandson on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa .5
programme.desc: Irving Zisman takes his young and impressionable grandson on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Night Call
programme.desc: After responding to an emergency call from a mysterious woman, a young locksmith gets unwittingly caught in the crosshairs of a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: The Good Half
programme.desc: A man returns home to Cleveland for his mothers funeral, where he must confront his grief, reconnect with estranged family members, and forge new relationships.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: A surgeon allows her young colleague to take charge during a surgery. When a mistake occurs, the surgeon finds herself in a difficult situation.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: The Good Half
programme.desc: A man returns home to Cleveland for his mothers funeral, where he must confront his grief, reconnect with estranged family members, and forge new relationships.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: The Tiger Rising
programme.desc: When a boy discovers a caged tiger in the woods near his home, his imagination runs wild as his life begins to change in unexpected ways.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In a countryside town bordering on a magical land, a young man ventures into the realm of fairies to retrieve a fallen star in order to win the heart of his beloved.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Unknown to humans, all-out war between cats and dogs has raged since the beginning of time. Now the cats face defeat if scientist Professor Brody can perfect a formula that will make all humans non-allergic to dogs. The cats leader, Mr Tinkles, plans to steal the serum, but first he must get past fearless dog agent Lou who, thanks to a mistake in recruitment, guards the Brody family.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog and Superman are inseparable best friends, now Krypto must convince a ragtag group of animals to master their own newfound powers to help him save Superman and the rest of the Justice League.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: The Cinema List: British Women
programme.desc: The Cinema List spotlights trailblazing British women directors, from `Mamma Mia! to `Promising Young Woman, celebrating female filmmaking talent.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: A social worker who specialises in missing children is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan child from evil forces.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley is a Liverpudlian housewife stuck in a loveless marriage. One day she finds herself talking to the wall, and decides to make some changes in her life. Flying off to the Greek island of Mykonos on her own, she is gently romanced by middle-aged waiter Costas.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Scary chiller about a coastal community plagued by a killer shark. With the summer tourist season at hand, the mayor is keen to keep the first attack hushed up. However, when an expert claims that the attacks are the work of a giant great white shark, there is only one solution - to kill the monster fish before it can feed again.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Another great white shark arrives to terrorise the holiday resort of Amity Island. Having recovered from the grisly events of four years ago, the island is once again packed with tourists. Families are sailing in the bay and swimming off the beach, but when two divers and a water-skier go missing, the local police chief fears that he is about to relive his greatest nightmare.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielbergs 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: The Exorcist
programme.desc: A famous actress calls upon medical science for help when her daughter begins behaving strangely, but without any success. Then, as bizarre and horrific incidents involving the daughter increase, her mother turns in desperation to the Church, and to a priest who doubts his own faith.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: When a familys pet cat is called, they manage to resurrect the animal by placing it in an Indian burial ground which, it is believed, can revive the dead, although in doing so they create a monster.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: When a familys pet cat is called, they manage to resurrect the animal by placing it in an Indian burial ground which, it is believed, can revive the dead, although in doing so they create a monster.

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: A spiritualist medium holds a seance for a writer suffering from writers block but accidentally summons the spirit of his deceased first wife which leads to an increasingly complex love triangle with his current wife of five years.

programme.title: Adult Life Skills
programme.desc: Anna is a little different. She lives in her mothers shed and spends much of her time privately making videos using her thumbs as actors. As her thirtieth birthday approaches, her mum tells her its time to move out.

programme.title: Finding Your Feet
programme.desc: A middle-class snob on the eve of retirement takes refuge with her bohemian sister after she discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend.

programme.title: Ride On
programme.desc: Washed-up stuntman Luo seeks help from his estranged daughter and her lawyer boyfriend when his beloved stunt horse may be auctioned off to pay his debts. Luo and Red Hare become a media sensation when their fight with debt collectors goes viral.

programme.title: Men in Black
programme.desc: The secretive Men in Black are agents charged with regulating the aliens who have settled on Earth and ensure that they remain undetected. New recruit J and his partner K must find and stop an intergalactic terrorist bent on assassinating two ambassadors from opposing galaxies before they can make peace.

programme.title: Men in Black II
programme.desc: Sequel to the sci-fi comedy about a top secret government task force set up to deal with unruly extraterrestrials. An MIB agent turns to the only man who can help him save the world from a rampaging, shape-shifting alien which has taken on the outward appearance of a sexy lingerie model.

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: Agent J goes back to the swinging 60s in a time-travelling mission to save his partner from a murderous alien.

programme.title: Were the Millers
programme.desc: Indebted to a big-time drug lord, a pot dealer travels to Mexico with a fake family and a camper to pick up a large shipment and smuggle it into the U.S.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Danny is sour after driving away his girlfriend, and Wheeler is into anything wearing a skirt. The two get into a fight with a trucker and choose community service over a jail term.

programme.desc: Anna is a little different. She lives in her mothers shed and spends much of her time privately making videos using her thumbs as actors. As her thirtieth birthday approaches, her mum tells her its time to move out.

programme.title: Man Finds Tape
programme.desc: When a series of strange video clips reveals a shocking murder, a brother and sister uncover a supernatural mystery thats overtaking their town.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

programme.title: Sketch
programme.desc: Fantastical creatures come to life when a girls sketchbook falls into a strange pond. As the town starts to unravel, she and her brother must track down the unpredictable, chaotic and dangerously real monsters before they cause permanent damage.

programme.title: On Swift Horses
programme.desc: Muriel and her husband, Lee, begin a new life together after he returns home from the Korean War. However, their newfound stability gets upended by the arrival of Lees charismatic brother, a wayward gambler with a secret past.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Tech billionaire Lex Luthor seizes the opportunity to get the Man of Steel out of the way for good. Will intrepid reporter Lois Lane and Supermans four-legged companion, Krypto, be able to help him before its too late?

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of paranoia, surviving off-grid with his daughter, Willa. When his nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her while battling the consequences of his past.

Together, they uncover the orders unholy secret. Risking not only their lives but their faith and their very souls, they confront a malevolent force in the form of a demonic nun.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: IT
programme.desc: Seven young outcasts in Derry, Maine, are about to face their worst nightmare -- an ancient, shape-shifting evil that emerges from the sewer every 27 years to prey on the towns children. Banding together over the course of one horrifying summer, the friends must overcome their own personal fears to battle the murderous, bloodthirsty clown known as Pennywise.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Companion

programme.title: Constantine
programme.desc: Supernatural tale based on the cult comic book `Hellblazer. Chain-smoking loner Constantine tries to buy his place in heaven by banishing earth-bound demons back to hell, but his fate is tied up with Angela, a policewoman investigating the alleged suicide of her twin.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Mars Attacks!
programme.desc: Bug-eyed martians in flying saucers descend on unsuspecting Planet Earth to wreak untold havoc, as they kidnap a chat-show host and a scientist for evil experiments and blow up famous monuments around the world. Who can protect our defenceless world from raygun-toting aliens?

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Timestalker
programme.desc: Hapless Agnes repeatedly falls for the wrong guy, dies a grim death, and is reincarnated a century later. As she experiences romantic misfortune through different eras of history, Agnes seeks to avoid repeat mistakes and finally break the cycle.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Following the adventures of Yang who is a successor in to a long line of Avatars. He has to put aside his childhood in order to stop he Fire Nation from enslaving the Water, Earth and Air nations.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit Bodelwyddan Castle in Denbighshire. Amongst the fine art and antiquities, the `Most Haunted team discover that some former residents of this plush abode would rather not leave. After the warm Welsh welcome, prepare for a series of spine chilling events and things that go bump in the night.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team investigate Annesley Hall. From style and splendour to danger and desolation - the `Most Haunted team are horrified by the sinister secrets that this manor house still harbours, having encountered both benevolent and belligerent spiritual entities. Their investigation culminates in an amazing phenomenon.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team investigate Tissington, an ancient family home which once witnessed a tragedy. In 1862, resident Wilhelmina Fitzherbert died due to severe burns and is said to still roam the hall.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team investigate Hellens Manor, a rural retreat that harbours a shocking tale of family degradation and dishonour. It has witnessed heartbreak and bloodshed, but who is responsible? Two victims from the manors past may well hold the answer.

programme.title: The Hotel

From reception to the gardens, from the bedrooms to the hallways and even under tables in the dining room, kids are everywhere, pushing the staff to the limits. Even manager Wayne, who normally loves the family atmosphere at the hotel, admits that if he were going on holiday hed chose a child-free hotel.

programme.title: Battle Of Britain
programme.desc: The story of one of the most thrilling chapters in the history of World War Two when under the inspired leadership of Winston Churchill, a nation defied Adolf Hitler and a planned Nazi invasion.

programme.desc: D-Day is 6th June, and over 300,000 soldiers are fighting on French soils, but by April, Berlin is surrounded and Hitler commits suicide. Germany is defeated.

programme.title: Last Voices of World War I

programme.title: Battleplan

programme.title: WW1 Battles

programme.title: Where Were You?

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Rights of Man (Except for Howard)
programme.desc: Hobbo decides that the still-homeless Howard needs to show Pearl whos boss, but after Pearl slams the door in his face, Howard is despondent. Hobbo is insistent that Howard just needs to remind Pearl of the good times, but will his bicycle skills be enough to win her back? Meanwhile, Marina helps Miss Davenport upgrade her appearance, and decides to seize the moment with Mr Waddle.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Hobbo and his `team turn Howard into a tramp to show Pearl how rough hes been living and convince her to take him back. The men pitch him a tent but Howards isnt keen and goes for a meal with Glenda and Barry. The men return to the camp with Howard to show Pearl how much hes roughing it, but Marina arrives at the same time and Hobbo and Howard bundle her into the tent.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Glenda sends a reluctant Barry off to paint a nice view, to take his mind off wanting to eat. Meanwhile, the dejected Howard wonders if Pearl still loves him. Hobbo takes pity on him. Hobbo delivers a message from Howard to Pearl - a brief peck - but Pearl grabs him and delivers a full-blooded kiss. Howard is aghast. Elsewhere, Glenda tells the uncertain Morton that hes going to Glorias wedding as Morias guest.

programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: Happy Valley

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The discovery of an armoured security van involved in the disappearance of one person and the unsolved murder of another provides the impetus for the team to look into the case again. programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries

programme.title: Wagspiracy: Vardy v Rooney
programme.desc: In 2019, Wagatha Christie gripped Britain as Coleen Rooney accused Rebekah Vardy of leaking stories about her to the tabloid press. Despite huge media attention on this social media scandal, and a trial that ended up in the high-court in the summer of 2022, with Rooney emerging victorious, the inside story of how and why this extraordinary moment in British culture came to pass, has never fully been told - until now.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo falls into line with the University of Glasgows Officer Training Corps. Founded in the early 20th century, the Corps flourishes today and Michael joins students for drill. From Glasgow, Michael heads west along the Firth of Clyde to Helensburgh, where he discovers a pioneering group of artists known as the Glasgow Boys.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: n Warwicks medieval castle he uncovers the scene of an extravagant and scandalous ball, which changed the life of its hostess, Daisy Greville, Countess of Warwick.At Cowley, Michael marvels at a spectacularly automated state-of-the-art production line producing 1,000 Minis a day and probes the pre-First World War origins of the Morris Oxford.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo picks up his rail journey from Warwick to Rye along the River Thames. In Reading, he traces the origins of education for workers. Messing about in boats is the name of the game in Henley on Thames, where Michael slips into a launch to hear about the world-famous regatta. Afternoon tea on the bank offers a chance to hear about four heroes of early 20th-century literary classic `The Wind in the Willows.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo reaches the capital. In the Queen of the Suburbs, Ealing, he finds comedy at the home of British cinema and is transformed for the silver screen by expert hair and make-up. In Fulham, Michael heads underground to Londons new super sewer, which is taking shape beneath the River Thames. In central London, he visits the London School of Economics and Political Science.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Daves drawn to a Fiat Uno 45 in hearing aid beige, a well-known manufacturers colour, with 36,000 miles on the clock.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul hits the road to collect an old navy ambulance that served its time as a holiday camper.

programme.title: Adolf Hitlers War
programme.desc: In Kursk, a `battlefield the size of Wales, the tide turns, and the Soviets push back, but as Germany retreats, they destroy all evidence of their genocidal activities.

programme.title: Churchills Bid to Abolish Britain
programme.desc: Following an astonishing story which challenges our understanding of the Second World War and our perception of world-renowned leaders.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is at Aston Hall in Birmingham, where treasures include some rare trading beads, memorable items from an Aston Villa legend and a collection of climbing gear from one of historys great mountaineers. Expert Will Farmer meets local man and celebrated poet Benjamin Zephaniah, who has brought along his own intriguing collection, and Fiona explores the Civil War-era history of the hall.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team are at Dyffryn Gardens near Cardiff in south Wales. Will Farmer is thrilled to see a huge collection of Clarice Cliff ceramics, including many rarities picked up for just a few pounds, while Hilary Kay is amused by a toy figure of a fire-breathing mother-in-law that shoots real sparks. Alastair Chandler is intrigued by a 1960s Atmos clock that runs on air, and Lisa Lloyd admires an ornate Welsh harp, getting to hear it played by a musician who is keeping the art alive.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The Restoring Classics team pays tribute to mid-80s Midlands by breathing new life into what was once the fastest production MG ever made: the Montego Turbo.

programme.desc: The team break with tradition and actually follow Dave Mathewsons advice on what to restore.

programme.desc: Gordon meets the Polar Bear Cops tasked with keeping the town safe. Kate heads to Sweden to help round up some reindeer and Simon joins the intrepid NASA scientists monitoring the melt of Greenlands glaciers. Plus, all the live action from the bears out on the tundra.

programme.title: Allo Allo!
programme.desc: British troops rescue Edith and Rene and the Germans decide to escape to Spain.

programme.title: Allo Allo!
programme.desc: The Colonel and Gruber make an escape bid to Spain, Herr Flick has had extensive plastic surgery, and Rene dithers over whether to continue his affair with Yvette or go back to his loving wife.

programme.desc: Communists capture Rene and Flick and Von Smallhausen try to fool Edith.

programme.desc: Shamil hunts down a battered 1940s Marconi Radiogram that has seen better days, and Rob is tasked with getting a 50s TV working again by the family who made them.

programme.title: Retro Electro Workshop
programme.desc: Series about the dying art of repairing electronics, fronted by super-fixer Rob Howard, one of the UKs last remaining full-time repair men of retro-electronic products.

programme.title: Masters of Reinvention
programme.desc: The team reinvent a 1936 design for a three-wheeled car using recycled parts and a reclaimed recumbent trike. Plus, Ruth and Carl rework a vintage burglar alarm.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo hits the West End to explore an exotic store, which was a favourite among Edwardian ladies. At Covent Gardens Royal Ballet School he hears how in 1909 a Russian ballet company took London by storm and how its prima ballerina inspired the schools founding choreographer. Leaving the capital from Charing Cross, Michael heads for Dartford in Kent, where he discovers the origins of netball and gymslips at the North Kent College.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Warwick to Rye in East Sussex. In the orchards of East Malling, Kent, Michael discovers that the Edwardians serious attitude towards cultivation bore fruit. Rootstock developed at the NIAB Centre for Fruit Research, established in 1913, is today responsible for much of world apple production.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Beginning just outside Newcastle in Jarrow, Michael uncovers the desperation which led 200 men to march 300 miles to Westminster in order to petition the Government for work. In Newcastle, Michael admires the citys iconic railway bridge before heading to Byker, where he discovers a new innovation in greyhound racing.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Steered by his 1936 Bradshaws Guide, Michael Portillo is in Northumbria en route to the Highlands. On this leg, he explores Kielder Forest, beginning at the County Show in Stocksfield. Michael discovers what lay behind a national initiative to plant one of the largest man-made woodlands in Europe. Crossing the border to Scotland, Michael arrives in the weaving town of Hawick to visit Lovat Mill, where, in the 1930s, tweed was big business.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: A low canal tunnel in Staffordshire proves a problem and Robbie helps out a stranded boater.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries

programme.title: Dom Chineas Cornish Workshop
programme.desc: Dom builds a drift car with engineer Sam Lovegrove. At home, he gets a digger in to make his new pond, and he and Sam have a go at gig rowing after fixing the club trailer in Hayle.

programme.title: Tropic of Capricorn
programme.desc: Simon Reeve continues his travels along the Tropic of Capricorn, the line of latitude that cuts across South Africa, South America and Australia. On the Australian west coast, Simon witnesses the migration of the humpback whale. He meets a tough outback couple refusing to leave an asbestos polluted ghost town and a farmer attempting to eke a living out of a dustbowl.

programme.title: Tropic of Capricorn
programme.desc: Simon Reeves journey around the world along the Tropic of Capricorn is the most spectacular stage yet. Beginning in Chile, Simon crosses the Atacama desert and climbs 15,000 feet into the Andes. In Argentina he dodges angry South American bees as he hunts for honey with the indigenous Wichi people, and in Brazil he tastes the delights of Sao Paolo, the biggest city in the Southern Hemisphere.

programme.title: David Jasons Great British Inventions
programme.desc: Sir David Jason finds out about the Penny Farthing as he looks at the British inventors who played a vital part in the evolution of the wheel.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek navigates the dry stone walls of the Peak District to collect a very original 1988 Opel Manta, Dave handles a rare Ford Granada rally support vehicle, and Paul contends with a Hilux monster truck.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Daves on his way to Grimsby to pick up an iconic 80s fast Ford, the Mk1 Fiesta XR2.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
